'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Mignay''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of the ''[[Rim Merchant Einem]]'', who had once been in the [[Trade Defense Force]] before being transferred to the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|judicial forces]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
